## Meeting Purpose

[Explore GrowthX.ai's content marketing services for Risotto, an AI IT support agent startup.](https://fathom.video/share/kzEi861sPzhzDzuygsdzgrsgyZeHoffa?tab=summary&timestamp=50.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Risotto seeks to improve their content marketing strategy, aiming for high-quality, technical content similar to Ironclad's blog](https://fathom.video/share/kzEi861sPzhzDzuygsdzgrsgyZeHoffa?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [GrowthX.ai offers an AI-powered content creation process with expert oversight, producing 5-6 articles/week (50,000 words/month)](https://fathom.video/share/kzEi861sPzhzDzuygsdzgrsgyZeHoffa?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)
  - [Pricing starts at $9,000/month for the editorial package, including content strategy and keyword research](https://fathom.video/share/kzEi861sPzhzDzuygsdzgrsgyZeHoffa?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [Aron is interested but wants to review examples of GrowthX.ai's work before committing to a follow-up call](https://fathom.video/share/kzEi861sPzhzDzuygsdzgrsgyZeHoffa?tab=summary&timestamp=1633.0)

## Topics

### Risotto Company Overview

  - [AI IT support agent in Slack, auto-solving 30% of tickets](https://fathom.video/share/kzEi861sPzhzDzuygsdzgrsgyZeHoffa?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [YC-backed startup (W24), raised $X million](https://fathom.video/share/kzEi861sPzhzDzuygsdzgrsgyZeHoffa?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
  - [6 full-time team members in San Francisco Bay Area](https://fathom.video/share/kzEi861sPzhzDzuygsdzgrsgyZeHoffa?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [Clients include Retool, Medium, Fundrise; aiming to disrupt ServiceNow ($231B valuation)](https://fathom.video/share/kzEi861sPzhzDzuygsdzgrsgyZeHoffa?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [Sales-driven model, no self-serve or product-led growth](https://fathom.video/share/kzEi861sPzhzDzuygsdzgrsgyZeHoffa?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)

### Current Content Marketing Challenges

  - [Basic blog with 80 AI-generated articles](https://fathom.video/share/kzEi861sPzhzDzuygsdzgrsgyZeHoffa?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [Seeking to improve content quality and relevance](https://fathom.video/share/kzEi861sPzhzDzuygsdzgrsgyZeHoffa?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [Aspiring to create content similar to Ironclad's blog](https://fathom.video/share/kzEi861sPzhzDzuygsdzgrsgyZeHoffa?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [Need for technical understanding and manual effort (e.g., screenshots)](https://fathom.video/share/kzEi861sPzhzDzuygsdzgrsgyZeHoffa?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)

### GrowthX.ai's Content Creation Approach

  - [AI-powered workflows with expert oversight](https://fathom.video/share/kzEi861sPzhzDzuygsdzgrsgyZeHoffa?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
  - [50,000 words/month (5-6 articles/week)](https://fathom.video/share/kzEi861sPzhzDzuygsdzgrsgyZeHoffa?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)
  - [Multi-step process involving research and human review](https://fathom.video/share/kzEi861sPzhzDzuygsdzgrsgyZeHoffa?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
  - [Team includes former TechCrunch editor and experienced content creators](https://fathom.video/share/kzEi861sPzhzDzuygsdzgrsgyZeHoffa?tab=summary&timestamp=857.0)
  - [Focus on scalability and strategic content alignment](https://fathom.video/share/kzEi861sPzhzDzuygsdzgrsgyZeHoffa?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)

### Pricing and Services

  - [Editorial package: $9,000/month](https://fathom.video/share/kzEi861sPzhzDzuygsdzgrsgyZeHoffa?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [Includes content and keyword strategy](https://fathom.video/share/kzEi861sPzhzDzuygsdzgrsgyZeHoffa?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)
  - [SEO analysis and metrics monitoring part of the package](https://fathom.video/share/kzEi861sPzhzDzuygsdzgrsgyZeHoffa?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)
  - [Potential for customization (e.g., fewer, more in-depth articles with visuals)](https://fathom.video/share/kzEi861sPzhzDzuygsdzgrsgyZeHoffa?tab=summary&timestamp=1341.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Initial 12-week "boot camp" to calibrate and start publishing](https://fathom.video/share/kzEi861sPzhzDzuygsdzgrsgyZeHoffa?tab=summary&timestamp=665.0)
  - [Ongoing weekly reviews and strategy adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/kzEi861sPzhzDzuygsdzgrsgyZeHoffa?tab=summary&timestamp=933.0)
  - [Emphasis on planting more "seeds" early to identify successful content directions](https://fathom.video/share/kzEi861sPzhzDzuygsdzgrsgyZeHoffa?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)

### Additional Services and Limitations

  - [Can work within client's CMS for publishing](https://fathom.video/share/kzEi861sPzhzDzuygsdzgrsgyZeHoffa?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)
  - [Limited design capabilities for custom graphics/screenshots](https://fathom.video/share/kzEi861sPzhzDzuygsdzgrsgyZeHoffa?tab=summary&timestamp=1376.0)
  - [Potential for CMS template improvements, but not primary focus](https://fathom.video/share/kzEi861sPzhzDzuygsdzgrsgyZeHoffa?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bruno to send relevant examples of past work to Aron](https://fathom.video/share/kzEi861sPzhzDzuygsdzgrsgyZeHoffa?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)
  - [Aron to review examples and decide on scheduling a follow-up call](https://fathom.video/share/kzEi861sPzhzDzuygsdzgrsgyZeHoffa?tab=summary&timestamp=1656.0)
  - [If examples are satisfactory, a more in-depth call with Marcel (likely the technical founder) to be arranged](https://fathom.video/share/kzEi861sPzhzDzuygsdzgrsgyZeHoffa?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
